LanguageData.DesignatorAllowDesc: Allow forbidden things in the selected area.
LanguageData.DesignatorForbidDesc: Forbid things in the selected area.
LanguageData.DesignatorAllowAllDesc: Allow every forbidden thing on the current map.
LanguageData.DesignatorHarvestFullyGrownDesc: Orders the harvesting of crops and trees that are fully grown and ready for maximum yield. Hold Shift to include only crops. Hold Ctrl/Cmd to include only trees. Right-click for more options.
LanguageData.HarvestFullyGrownFailure: No fully grown plants found to harvest.
